typo3/cms-indexed-search.name: typo3/cms-indexed-search
typo3/cms-indexed-search.description: TYPO3 CMS Indexed Search - Provides indexing functionality for TYPO3 pages and records as well as files including PDF, Word, HTML and plain text.

suggest.ext-exif: Used to extract exif metadata 'COMMENT' and 'ImageDescription' of uploaded images
suggest.typo3/cms-scheduler: For garbage collection of search statistics
For garbage collection of search statistics

typo3/cms-indexed-search.description: Indexed Search Engine for TYPO3 pages, PDF-files, Word-files, HTML and text files. Provides a backend module for statistics of the indexer and a frontend plugin.

Indexed Search Engine for TYPO3 pages, PDF-files, Word-files, HTML and text files. Provides a backend module for statistics of the indexer and a frontend plugin. Documentation can be found in the extension "doc_indexed_search".

suggest.typo3/cms-scheduler: For garbage collection of search statistics
